MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marina Vinsky for and with Nina Martini (Executor). Edward Broitman for Valentina Blizenko. Kendel Fletcher for Russina American Community Services and St. Vladimir.

Off Calendar Feb-29-2012 Off Calendar

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (607 23rd Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marina Vinsky for and with Nina Martini.

The sale was confirmed at $520,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The proceeds from the sale are to be placed into a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account is set for February 29, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguer/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Notice Of Motion And Motion
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mila Lvovich and Kendall Fletcher for Russian American Community Services Association and for Russian Home for St. Vladimir. Eric Miller for Irene Barrese.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court denied the Motion to Compel Responses to Discovery and denied both parites's request for sanctions. Ms. Lvovich will prepare an order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (607 23rd Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Jan-30-2012 Continued To Feb-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marina Vinsky for and with Nina Martini.

The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to February 15, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to address the issue of notice and posting.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Brown.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Continued To Feb-29-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Milla Lvovich for Contestants. Marina Vinsky for Nina Martini (Special Administrator). Edward Broitman for Valentina Blizenko, Tamara Helinsky, Andre Kovtun, Mauro Kovtun, Victor Yakimoff (Deceased), Olga Yakimoff (Deceased), and Andre (Son of Victor and Olga).

Mr. Broitman agreed to accept service on behalf of the Parties located in Brazil. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 24, 2012. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 24, 2012. The Petition for Probate of Will and the Will Contest was continued to and the Parties are to return on February 29, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Continued To Nov-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Milla Lvovich for Russian American Community Services and for Russian Home for St. Vladimir. Milla Lvovich also made a special appearance for Attorney Marina Vinsky for Nina Martini. Eric Miller for Irene Barrese (Moving Party).

The matter was presented and argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the demurrer was sustained with 30-days leave to amend. The Motion to Strike was taken off calendar subject to being renewed if another demurrer is filed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
